# quickplay.fun

> A free browser game: watch a one-second clip from a movie and guess the film before a
> 20-second timer runs out. Focused on Indian cinema — Hindi, Tamil and Malayalam. No signup.
> Play solo or create a shareable room to play with friends on a live leaderboard.

## How it works
- Watch a 1-second movie clip.
- Type the movie's name before the timer ends (misspellings within ~62% still count).
- Solo games are 4 clips; friends games are 4, 6 or 8.
- At the end you get a shareable score card with a stylish rank.

## Pages
- [Home / Play](https://quickplay.fun): start a solo or friends game.
- [Guess the Malayalam Movie](https://quickplay.fun/guess-the-malayalam-movie)
- [Guess the Hindi Movie](https://quickplay.fun/guess-the-hindi-movie)
- [Guess the Tamil Movie](https://quickplay.fun/guess-the-tamil-movie)
- [Suggest a movie](https://quickplay.fun/submit): add a missing film for review.

## Facts
- Price: Free, no signup, no account required.
- Platform: Web browser (mobile and desktop).
- Languages: Hindi (Bollywood), Tamil (Kollywood), Malayalam.
- Modes: Solo, or multiplayer rooms with a shareable link and live leaderboard.
